title: neottianthe pseudodiphylax
intro: Neottianthe pseudodiphylax, also known as Neottianthe, is a genus of orchid found in subtropical regions, particularly in Asia and the Americas. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottianthe pseudodiphylax include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Neottianthe pseudodiphylax are typically made by drying the roots and stems of the plant, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction.
